query:
WITH target_mimi_ids AS(
                SELECT mimi_id FROM message_edit WHERE message_id = ?
                UNION ALL
                SELECT ?
            )
            UPDATE message
            SET in_reply_to_mimi_id = ?
            WHERE in_reply_to_mimi_id IN (SELECT * FROM target_mimi_ids)
            RETURNING message_id AS "message_id: _"
